ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the provided document:  India Power Corporation Limited (formerly DPSC Limited) is currently undergoing a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) initiated by the NCLT, a severe red flag indicating profound financial distress. An Interim Resolution Professional (IRP) has been appointed and is now managing the company's affairs, which presents a material risk of substantial losses for shareholders and creditors. This specific document primarily serves as a compliance update, confirming the company's website has been made functional under the IRP's authority.
